== Notes for [[Item:Q109933|Q109933]] ==

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Atikah_bint_Yazid

----

"Atika bint Yazid (Arabic: عاتكة بنت يزيد, romanized: ʿĀtika bint Yazīd) was an Umayyad princess. She was the daughter of Yazid I, and wife of Abd al-Malik ibn Marwan..."

"...Atika and Abd al-Malik had sons; Yazid II, Marwan al-Asghar, Mu'awiya and a daughter, Umm Kulthum...."

Read more [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Atika_bint_Yazid#:~:text=Atika%20was%20the%20daughter%20of,age%20of%20somewhere%20between%2017 '''here'''].

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Damascus

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
